markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Joel Honasan for an Account Executive role at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Relevant Experience:** Joel Honasan has a strong background in agency services (Quantum Mob) and SaaS (Hotjar, ContentSquare), making him a direct fit for growthx's hybrid services-plus-software model.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [**Proven Sales Acumen:** Demonstrated ability to expand inbound leads into large, multi-threaded deals, as shown by a $650k deal at Quantum Mob.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [**Strategic Alignment:** Attracted to growthx's "service as a subscription" model and the opportunity to join a high-growth, venture-backed startup.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Interview with VP of Operations Bridget is the next stage; a decision will be communicated within 1–2 days.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background & Motivation

  - [**Experience:** \~10 years in sales across agencies and SaaS.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [**Quantum Mob (Agency):** Founding BDR/AE; scaled team from 14 to 30–40 employees.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
      - [**Hotjar (SaaS):** Managed high-volume inbound leads (10–20/week) for SMB/mid-market.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**ContentSquare (SaaS):** Current role selling to mid-market/enterprise.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [**Motivation for growthx:**](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [**Model:** "Service as a subscription" approach resonated with his agency background.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [**Growth:** Excited by the opportunity to join a venture-backed startup and help build a sales process from the ground up.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Sales Philosophy & Strategy

  - [**Value Positioning:** Connect product features to high-level business outcomes.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [**Method:** Use qualitative data (Hotjar) to explain the "how" and "why" behind quantitative metrics (GA).](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [**Goal:** Equip C-suite with confident, data-driven insights for strategic decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [**Outbound Strategy:** Focus on high-relevance and low-commitment tactics to cut through noise.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**Current Channels:** Phone and LinkedIn are primary; email is used with personalization agents.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
      - [**Effective Tactic:** Leverage location ("I'm in Toronto next week...") for a light commitment ("grab a coffee") to discuss a high-level topic (e.g., data strategy).](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

### Deal Example: Quantum Mob Bank Deal

  - [**Context:** A $650k deal with a tier-three bank, sourced from a single inbound lead.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [**Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [**Multi-threading:** Expanded from one contact to two VPs (Cards & Payments, Development).](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
      - [**Project Consolidation:** Connected two separate projects (app redesign, development) into a single, larger opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [**Value-Add:** Provided free POCs (mock-ups, frames) to help the client build an internal business case.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [**Outcome:** A 3-month cycle resulting in a $650k close.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [**Self-Reflection:**](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
      - [**Rating:** 7–8/10 for strong collaboration and multi-threading.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
      - [**Improvement:** Would have used a mutual action plan to structure timelines and project more confidence.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)

### growthx.ai Sales Vision

  - [**Goal:** 3x ARR from a $13M run rate.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [**Hiring Plan:** Add 1–2 more AEs in 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [**Team Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Leads Services sales (ACV: $180k–$300k+).](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
      - [**Nigel:** Leads "Check That" platform sales (ACV: \~$20k).](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [**New Hire:** Will sell a combination of services and software.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [**Lead Distribution:** Currently split by product. A round-robin system will be implemented when a second services AE is hired.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [**Reporting Structure:** Reports to VP of Operations Bridget (onboarding) and CEO Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Communicate a decision on next steps within 1–2 days.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
  - [**Joel Honasan:** Await decision; if positive, prepare for an interview with VP of Operations Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/GWnYhV4NtXe8QoUTRYCv3sJwj5FsNmKH?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
